productDisplayName: Vans Men Sk8-Hi Black Casual Shoes
description: vans brings you footwear for the urban youth. Inspired by surfers, the SK 8 Hi shoes come in a classic high top design. Team these with cargos or jeans and graphic tees. Upper Leather uppers in a high top design for durability and comfort Leather overlays on the sides and stitch detailing for added style and reinforcement Built up, padded collar for extra comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name embossed on the back, on the lasting and brand tab appliqued on the tongue Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
